name: Alice Johnson
bio: Alice is a senior technical writer and software engineer with over a decade of experience in developer documentation and content strategy. She specializes in making complex technical concepts accessible to a broad audience.

name: Bob Smith
bio: Bob is a full-stack developer and content creator focusing on web technologies, modern JavaScript frameworks, and user experience design. He believes in building content systems that work for both editors and end-users.

name: Dr. Maria Garcia
bio: Maria holds a PhD in Computer Science and is passionate about making scientific research accessible to the public. She writes about AI, quantum computing, and the intersection of technology and society.

name: James Wilson
bio: James is a UX designer passionate about design systems, accessibility, and human-centered design. He writes about design processes, user research, and creating inclusive digital experiences.
